data_description.dhcp_software: The DHCP server running on the router, used to resolve device hostnames.

yaml_import_cannot_connect.title: YAML import failed: cannot connect
yaml_import_cannot_connect.description:
The YAML configuration for OpenWrt (ubus) at `{host}` could not be imported because the connection failed.

Please check that `{host}` is reachable, update your `configuration.yaml` if needed, and restart Home Assistant.
